company.name: AWC Enterprizes
company.description: Premium glass work, balcony railing systems, designer doors, windows, partitions, PVC items, aluminium solutions, fittings and enterprise hardware.

sources: GLASS BLACONY DEALER PRICE LIST MARCH-1.pdf

categories.name: Glass & Balcony Systems
categories.summary: Clear, tinted and frosted toughened glass systems for balconies, staircases, partitions and premium interiors.

products.name: Toughened Glass Balcony Railing
products.description: A refined railing system for residential and commercial balconies using toughened glass panels with clean edge detailing.
specs: Clear, tinted and frosted glass variants
Compatible with SS and aluminium fittings

products.name: SS-304 Spigot Railing System
products.description: Minimal spigot-based glass railing setup for open, modern spaces where visibility and premium finishing matter.
specs: Base cover plate and gasket support

products.name: Aluminium Top-Rail Glass Railing
products.description: A sturdy glass railing profile with top rail, wall conceal fittings, bends and jointers for continuous balcony runs.
specs: Black, grey and wooden coated finish options
A-type, T-type and ferry bracket options

products.name: LED Bottom Profile Railing
products.description: Statement glass railing profile with integrated lighting-friendly base detailing for luxury interiors and staircases.
specs: Ideal for villas, showrooms and feature zones

products.name: Glass Partitions & Interior Panels
products.description: Clean glass partition work for offices, showrooms and interiors needing openness with elegant separation.

categories.name: Windows, Doors & Profiles
categories.summary: uPVC, aluminium and glass-aligned opening systems for durable, low-maintenance building envelopes.

products.name: uPVC Casement Window System
products.description: Premium uPVC window profile suitable for homes, offices and hospitality spaces requiring durability and insulation.
specs: Compatible with glass and mesh options

products.name: Sliding & Fixed Window Profiles
products.description: Practical window profile solutions for large openings, fixed panels, ventilation zones and facade work.

products.name: uPVC Door System
products.description: A refined door profile option for balconies, entries and utility areas where stability and clean finishing are essential.

products.name: Profile Supply & Fabrication Support
products.description: Enterprise supply support for profiles, fabrication needs and project-level product selection.

categories.name: Designer Door Collections
categories.summary: Decorative, digital and premium wood-finish door collections for high-end residential and interior projects.

products.name: Premium Designer Doors
products.description: Elegant decorative doors with modern patterns and premium room-set presentation for upscale interiors.

products.name: Digital Decorative Doors
products.description: Statement door surfaces with digital-style motifs and expressive finishes for feature rooms and entry points.

products.name: Modern Flush & Panel Doors
products.description: Clean modern door options with horizontal lines, subtle paneling and refined wood tones.

products.name: Ornamental Entry Doors
products.description: Decorative door styles with accent inlays and pattern work for premium front-facing applications.

categories.name: PVC, Lamination & Interior Items
categories.summary: PVC membrane doors, lamination door panels, cabinet shutters and furniture-front solutions.

products.name: PVC Membrane Door Shutters
products.description: Decorative membrane door shutter options for interiors, cabinetry and furniture-facing requirements.

products.name: Lamination Door Sets
products.description: Curated lamination door designs with wood, geometric and decorative pattern options.
specs: Suitable for apartments and commercial interiors

products.name: Cabinet & Furniture Door Panels
products.description: Panel solutions for cabinets, furniture fronts and interior installations requiring coordinated finishes.

products.name: Decorative Interior Panels
products.description: Patterned PVC and lamination items for interior surface upgrades and custom project requirements.

categories.name: Fittings & Hardware
categories.summary: Glass, railing, door and window accessories including brackets, rails, gaskets, handles and installation-ready fittings.

products.name: Railing Brackets & Accessories
products.description: Ferry brackets, A-type brackets, T-type brackets, wall conceal pieces, bends and jointers for railing assemblies.
specs: A-type, T-type and ferry bracket formats

products.name: Spigots, Gaskets & Base Covers
products.description: Installation essentials for clean glass railing assemblies, including spigots, gaskets and cover plates.

products.name: Door & Window Fitting Support
products.description: Hardware coordination for designer doors, uPVC systems, sliding windows and aluminium/glass projects.
